step_rationale: Th2 cytokine; atheroprotective; elevated in clopidogrel nonresponders.
mechanism: IL-4 shifts macrophage polarization toward repair phenotype and is dysregulated in ACS, influencing post-MI injury and remodeling.

references.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association
